name: MolVision 分子图像识别
tagline: PatSight MolVision：分子结构图一键识别，提取 SMILES/SDF 并生成 RDKit 属性报告
description: PatSight MolVision: OCSR (image-to-structure) recognition for molecular images. Batch process 1-N images, extract SMILES/SDF via Patent Extractor API, compute RDKit properties (formula, MW, LogP, TPSA, etc.), and generate PNG reports. First-time users: register at https://patent.xinsight-ai.com/home. Requires PatSight account and password.
